title: FragilityAlertPayload
description: Consumer contract per AD-3 SPEC — webhook payload emitted to external customers when a systemic-risk threshold is crossed. Any change to this schema is a BREAKING CHANGE for downstream consumers; bump $id path (e.g. v2.schema.json) instead of mutating in place.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp with mandatory trailing Z.

fragility_score.description: Systemic risk score bounded [0, 100] with two-decimal precision. multipleOf 0.01 prevents scientific-notation edge cases in consumer parsers.

alert_level.description: GREEN is intentionally omitted — no payload is emitted below the YELLOW threshold.
